text.title: Accessibility-First Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable inputs to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. MANDATORY for every methodology — even flat ones — per F-066 DoD.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the structure section (headings + landmarks + reading order) drafted before visuals?

branch.question: Is focus order specified for any modal/drawer component?
Does every animation have a reduced-motion alternate?

text.example: Concrete walk: Checkout confirm modal: structure (h2 + dialog) → focus order [close, cancel, confirm] → animation 'slide-in' with `opacity-fade-150ms` alternate → handoff to engineering.
